name: Testing something
description:

Update 1: I forgot to fix the links on the other images(since I only tested the first one and it worked)

Update 2: I added "OOC:" oh and I forgot to public the character definitions

non-update update: I noticed that if it takes a little while for the bot to write something(when Text Streaming is on) it means that it will make the link, but if it writes instantly, then it produces random shit

Update 3: I went away to play some video games, anyway, I removed the "Pick one" that might've influenced stuff and also added a colon symbol

non-update update 2: had the highest chance of success, but it is still very scuffed

Update 4: nothing changed on the character definitions, I will now be putting the latest update number on the top, and that I will also go to sleep now
